user.title: Set up OpenAI API Compatible Server
user.description: Configure a server that provides OpenAI API compatible endpoints

init.title: Configure OpenAI API Compatible Server
init.description: Adjust settings for the OpenAI API compatible server

restart.name: Restart
restart.description: Restarts the OpenAI API compatible server

clear_rate_limits.name: Clear Rate Limits
clear_rate_limits.description: Clears rate limits for one or all clients

client_id.name: Client ID
client_id.description: ID of the client to clear rate limits for. If not specified, clears for all clients

message.name: Message
message.description: Message to send to the API

agent_id.name: Agent ID
agent_id.description: ID of the conversation agent to use. If not specified, uses the default agent
